layout-studio:0.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1080" height="1080" viewBox="0 0 1080 1080"><rect width="920" height="920" x="80" y="80" fill="#fff" rx="32" ry="32"/><rect width="780" height="780" x="600" y="-320" fill="#d1e7ff" rx="390" ry="390" transform="rotate(24 990 70)"/><g dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Outfit, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="68" font-weight="600"><text x="158" y="563" fill="#0e1217">Design once,</text><text x="158" y="639.16" fill="#4f84ba">ship everywhere</text></g><text x="158" y="848" fill="#5c646d" dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Outfit, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="400">Templates, tokens and tools — one canvas.</text></svg>

layout-studio:1.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1080" height="1080" viewBox="0 0 1080 1080"><rect width="720" height="720" x="-260" y="620" fill="#082a49" rx="360" ry="360" transform="rotate(-18 100 980)"/><g fill="#f3f5f8" dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Outfit, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="58" font-weight="500"><text x="128" y="264">“Constraints are the fastest</text><text x="128" y="330.69">route to a consistent brand.”</text></g><text x="128" y="746" fill="#80afe1" dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Outfit, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="600">— The starter template</text></svg>

layout-studio:2.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1080" height="1080" viewBox="0 0 1080 1080"><path fill="#369" d="M0 0h540v1080H0z"/><path fill="#eef6ff" d="M540 0h540v1080H540z"/><g dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Outfit, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="58" font-weight="600"><text x="80" y="173" fill="#fff">Your brand,</text><text x="80" y="237.95" fill="#a9cff6">your rules</text></g><text x="80" y="548" fill="#d1e7ff" dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Outfit, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="300">Every export stays on-palette.</text><rect width="270" height="84" x="72" y="770" fill="#0e1217" rx="42" ry="42"/><text x="124.33" y="798" fill="#fff" dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Outfit, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="600">Get started →</text><rect width="220" height="220" x="700" y="300" fill="#4f84ba" rx="48" ry="48" transform="rotate(45 810 410)"/></svg>
